headline: AdCellerant Appoints Jonathan Kalstein as Chief Financial Officer
summary: Experienced finance executive joins AdCellerant to support continued growth, operational scale, and long-term financial strategyDENVER, June 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- AdCellerant, a leading digital advertising technology and services company, announced today the appointment of Jonathan Kalstein as Chief Financial Officer, where he will help guide the company’s financial strategy as it expands its platform, partner network, and omnichannel advertising capabilities.
